task_completion.description: Perform an SEO crawl/audit on books.toscrape.com
task_completion.visual_evidence: An SEO auditing tool (like Screaming Frog) or a terminal running a script showing a crawl of https://books.toscrape.com/.

task_completion.description: Export page title issue data to a CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or spreadsheet showing a CSV file with 'title' in its name located in the ~/Documents/SEO/exports/ directory.

task_completion.description: Export meta description issue data to a CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or spreadsheet showing a CSV file with 'description' in its name located in the ~/Documents/SEO/exports/ directory.
A text editor or terminal showing the file onpage_audit_report.txt located in ~/Documents/SEO/reports/.

task_completion.description: Include total page count, missing descriptions count, and a recommendation in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of onpage_audit_report.txt visible in a text editor, containing a number for total pages, a number for missing descriptions, and text providing an SEO recommendation.

integrity.description: The agent actually crawled the website to gather data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an SEO tool or script interface with crawl results for books.toscrape.com, rather than just manually typing numbers into a text file.

integrity.description: The exported CSVs contain real data from the website.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the CSV contents are visible, they should contain actual URLs from books.toscrape.com and relevant SEO issue data, not dummy text.

integrity.description: The report is generated based on actual findings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers in the report should plausibly come from the crawl results shown in earlier screenshots (e.g., total pages >= 50).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/. Export directory: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/onpage_audit_report.txt. The website contains approximately 1000 books across 50 pages, so a genuine crawl should reflect a page count of at least 50, and CSV exports should contain multiple rows (at least 20).
